atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right big toe pain and redness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a two-week history of intermittent right big toe pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain was initially mild.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is now significantly painful.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the toe became red and warm to the touch.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the redness and warmth occurred last week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as throbbing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as occasionally sharp.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by movement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by prolonged weight-bearing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty walking the halls.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports needing to stand still.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent injury or trauma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been taking ibuprofen twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has hallux rigidus

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is significant cartilage loss in the right big toe joint

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with palpation

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with movement

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with pressure on the outside of the toe

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with pressure on the inside of the toe

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Bone spurs are palpable

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The joint moves approximately 20 degrees with pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam, 1mg daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up appointment is scheduled in two weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Consider a shot or surgical intervention to clean out the joint if symptoms do not improve

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to continue working and doing his regular activities

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to test the orthotics and medication
